title: Training and development
summary: 9609 AS — induction, on-the-job and off-the-job training, and development.
learningObjectives: Explain benefits to firm and employee.

simpleExplanation.title: Building skills over time
simpleExplanation.summary: Training fixes current skill gaps; development prepares employees for future roles. Both reduce errors and aid retention.

sections.content: **Training and development** (2.1.6) supports **workforce planning 2.1.2**. Judge **cost vs productivity gain**.
